attributes.title: [Traefik OTel] Overview
attributes.description: High-level Traefik proxy health and traffic flow. Request rates, error rates, open connections, and bandwidth.

params.markdown:
## [Traefik OTel] Overview

This dashboard provides an overview of Traefik proxy health and traffic:
- Request rate and traffic volume across entrypoints
- HTTP error rates (4xx and 5xx)
- Open connections by entrypoint
- Bandwidth (request/response bytes)
- Request distribution by status code

query.esql:
FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
| EVAL duration_sec = DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts)
| EVAL request_rate = CASE(duration_sec > 0, total / duration_sec, 0.0)
| KEEP request_rate

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
| EVAL duration_sec = DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts)
| EVAL request_rate = CASE(duration_sec > 0, total / duration_sec, 0.0)
| KEEP request_rate

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total), errors_5xx = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total) WHERE attributes.code LIKE "5*"
| EVAL error_rate = CASE(total > 0, errors_5xx / total, 0.0)
| STATS error_rate = MAX(error_rate)

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total), errors_5xx = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total) WHERE attributes.code LIKE "5*"
| EVAL error_rate = CASE(total > 0, errors_5xx / total, 0.0)
| STATS error_rate = MAX(error_rate)

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_open_connections IS NOT NULL
| STATS connections = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(traefik_open_connections))

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_open_connections IS NOT NULL
| STATS connections = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(traefik_open_connections))

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_responses_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_responses_bytes_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
| EVAL duration_sec = DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts)
| EVAL bytes_rate = CASE(duration_sec > 0, total / duration_sec, 0.0)
| KEEP bytes_rate

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_responses_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_responses_bytes_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
| EVAL duration_sec = DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts)
| EVAL bytes_rate = CASE(duration_sec > 0, total / duration_sec, 0.0)
| KEEP bytes_rate

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.entrypoint
| EVAL bucket_secs = GREATEST(DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts), 1)
| EVAL request_rate = total / bucket_secs
| KEEP time_bucket, attributes.entrypoint, request_rate
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.entrypoint
| EVAL bucket_secs = GREATEST(DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts), 1)
| EVAL request_rate = total / bucket_secs
| KEEP time_bucket, attributes.entrypoint, request_rate
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.code
| EVAL bucket_secs = GREATEST(DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts), 1)
| EVAL requests = total / bucket_secs
| KEEP time_bucket, attributes.code, requests
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.code
| EVAL bucket_secs = GREATEST(DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts), 1)
| EVAL requests = total / bucket_secs
| KEEP time_bucket, attributes.code, requests
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_open_connections IS NOT NULL
| STATS connections = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(traefik_open_connections)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.entrypoint
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"

| STATS connections = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(traefik_open_connections)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.entrypoint

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_requests = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total) BY attributes.code
| SORT total_requests DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_requests = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total) BY attributes.code

| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_requests = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total) BY attributes.entrypoint

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
